name: Fishers Founders United
tagline: Building the startup ecosystem in Hamilton County
description: A community of entrepreneurs, makers, and curious minds calling Fishers home. We host monthly meetups, pitch nights, and workshops to help each other grow.

name: Hamilton County Makers
description: A collective of hardware hackers, artists, and tinkerers in the Fishers and Noblesville area. Open build nights every other Thursday.

name: Launch Fishers
description: A dedicated space for entrepreneurs and remote workers in the heart of Fishers. Hot desks, private offices, meeting rooms, and a community of driven people.
